title: Commercial Performance and Analytics Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Economics, Data Analytics or related
3+ years in commercial analytics, sales force effectiveness, or similar
matched_skills: Power BI (PL-300 certified) and advanced Excel
Customer segmentation and cohort analysis (explicitly in CV skills)
KPI design and tracking (HSBC, VfB Stuttgart)
missing_skills: Sales Force Effectiveness (SFE) — territory alignment, incentive schemes
core_responsibilities: Lead customer segmentation, SFE, territory alignment, and incentive schemes
Market analytics: trends, competitors, customer segmentation
Define and track KPIs across commercial functions
Support business development through data-driven evaluations
Extract CRM insights for leadership and field teams
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Power BI (PL-300) and Excel as explicit tool match
Highlight customer segmentation from CV skills — direct match to SFE segmentation
Frame GRG Banking portfolio analysis as commercial analytics analogue
Frame HSBC financial performance analytics as commercial performance measurement
Data storytelling to C-suite is a strong match
Acknowledge pharma industry gap; frame as analytical transferability
